scripts.build: bun run --filter @agent-notify/core build && bun run --filter opencode-agent-notify build && bun run --filter agent-notify-cli build
scripts.build:binary: bun run build && bun build cli/src/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/agent-notify --target bun
scripts.build:binary:arm64: bun run build && bun build cli/src/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/agent-notify-darwin-arm64 --target bun --target-arch arm64
scripts.build:binary:x64: bun run build && bun build cli/src/index.ts --compile --outfile dist/agent-notify-darwin-x64 --target bun --target-arch x64
